step.title: Load sprint-status
step.action: Read the current sprint-status.md from docs/implementation-artifacts/.

step.title: Count stories by status
step.action: Count stories in each status: to-do, in-progress, in-review, done. Update the status table.

step.title: Identify blockers
step.action: Identify any blocked stories and document the blocking issues.

step.title: Update burndown
step.action: Update the burndown data with current progress metrics.

step.title: Report status
step.action: Update docs/implementation-artifacts/sprint-status.md with the latest status information.
